sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking the blue shape
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find all small colored dots
print("Small colored nodes (pixels <= 4):")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 4 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'c', 'W']:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the blue shape
b_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"\nBlue shape nodes: {len(b_nodes)}")
for n in b_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check white strip
w_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'W']
print(f"\nWhite strip: {len(w_nodes)}")
for n in w_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
